title: Sky Bet League Two: Pre-match stat pack
text: Sky Bet League Two pre-match stat pack ahead of the final weekend of the 2025-26 regular season. The 2025-26 EFL League Two is the 22nd season of the EFL League Two under its current title, and the 34th season under its current league division format. The season began on 2 August 2025, and ends on 25 May 2026. The relegation battle is going down to the final day. League Two playoff teams confirmed: Salford City, Grimsby, Notts County and Chesterfield will battle it out for a trip to Wembley. Sky Bet League Two play-offs include semi-final 1st leg between Grimsby and Salford. The 2026 League Two play-off final returns to Wembley Stadium on May 25, 2026.
